results.rendered_html:
īdṛśa, mf(ī)n. or īdṛśaka, mf(ikā)n. endowed with such qualities, such,  ŚBr. ;  ChUp. ;  Mn. ;  R. ;  Bhag.  :  Śak.  &c.;
[with the final syllables dṛś and dṛśa of these words cf. the Gk. λικ in ὁμῆλιξ, λικο in τηλίκο-ς &c.; Goth. leika in hvêleiks, ‘which one’, svaleik-s, ‘such’; Mod. Germ. welcher, solcher; Slav. liko nom. lik, e.g. tolik, ‘such’; Lat. li in tâlis, quâlis.]
